questions.prompt: Which value gives a perfect circle to a square element?
questions.explanation: 50% clips to a circle regardless of the box's pixel size — as long as width == height.
The individual corner property rounds only that corner.

questions.prompt: Give ONLY the top-left AND bottom-right corners a 12px radius. Use the shorthand.
questions.hint: border-radius: TL TR BR BL — like margin, going clockwise from top-left.
questions.explanation: border-radius: 12px 0 12px 0 rounds only two opposite corners.
